# BP-96 positive variant: QueryContext result uses an alternate rows name
lang: go
file: BP-96-variant-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

func load(db *sql.DB) error {
	rs, err := db.QueryContext(context.Background(), "select 1")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	_ = rs
	return nil
}
